items.briefing:
Cyber attackers are increasingly targeting education technology (EdTech) software suppliers rather than schools directly — a tactic relevant to registered training organisations (RTOs) that rely on third-party learning platforms and student management systems. If your RTO uses external software providers, their security posture directly affects your risk. Separately, a new report confirms that most ransomware victims only discover an attack *after* their data has already been stolen, meaning damage is often done before anyone notices something is wrong.

**Practical tip:** Ask your key software vendors what security measures they have in place — if they can't answer clearly, that's a red flag worth escalating.

featured.title: ASD to retire Essential Eight within two years, consults on replacement
featured.quote: Australia's cybersecurity framework is fundamentally changing with Essential Eight retirement.
